text: The environmental case is hard to dodge: animal agriculture is roughly 14.5% of human-caused greenhouse emissions, and beef needs about 20x the land per gram of protein versus legumes.
label: argument

text: Anyone who still eats meat in 2026 just doesn't care about the planet, full stop.
label: hot_take

text: Three months in and my parents still leave meat on my plate. How do you all deal with family who won't take it seriously?
